rationale: No direct conflict. §45.2541 governs use of FSP appropriations for bond credit enhancement when PSF capacity is exceeded. The homestead exemption increase indirectly raises state FSP costs but does not alter the operative mechanism or requirements of this section.
quote: If Foundation School Program appropriations are not sufficient in any year to pay principal or interest that becomes due on bonds for which credit enhancement is provided under this subchapter, the payment shall be made from the following year's Foundation School Program appropriations
_note: Indirect fiscal pressure may arise if increased homestead exemption raises state FSP obligations, reducing appropriations available for credit enhancement under subsection (b), but no statutory text directly conflicts.
